Commission Your Dream Piece

Transform your vision into reality. Our master craftsmen will bring your unique design to life, creating a piece that transcends generations.

Delivery

Consultation

Share your vision with our design experts. We'll discuss your preferences, budget, and timeline to create a personalized roadmap.

Design

Our artisans create detailed CAD renderings and select the perfect stones from our private collection.

Crafting

Master craftsmen spend weeks perfecting every detail, ensuring each piece meets our exacting standards.

Delivery

Your masterpiece arrives with GIA certification, BIS hallmark, and lifetime support guarantee.

Why Choose Bespoke

A Legacy in Every Detail

Your information is secure. We never share your details and only use them to respond to your inquiry.

What to Expect

Our typical bespoke commission takes 9-12 weeks from concept to delivery

1

Weeks 1-2

Initial consultation and design conceptualization

2

Weeks 3-4

Design finalization and stone selection

3

Weeks 5-8

Crafting and quality inspection

4

Weeks 9-12

Polishing, certification, and delivery

Frequently Asked Questions

Typically 9-12 weeks depending on complexity. The process includes consultation (1-2 weeks), design development (2-3 weeks), crafting (4-5 weeks), and final delivery (1-2 weeks).

Absolutely! We provide detailed CAD renderings and 3D visualizations for your approval before any crafting begins.

You can cancel at any stage before crafting begins. Refunds are processed based on work completed. Consultation is always free.

Prefer to Speak Directly?

Schedule a private consultation with our design team.
